content.body: I put some topics from Oli on the Numerics agenda

Thanks for the review!

The agenda item calls out both proposals by name.

I edited Point 6: https://github.com/tc39/proposal-intl-sequence-units/commit/8b6ab9542c6024f5121483d5cdb96e7bbb1dc631

I'll let you voice the comment about "[Amount]'s units support is solely and completely driven by what's in units.xml" in the plenary. I think I agree with you that Amount shouldn't exclude single time units, because it would create a new class of errors. It seems good to be explicit about that in the discussion.
unfortunately I'll be away for the Numerics call tomorrow (I'll be on vacation)
I'm taking a look at Oli's issue

The point 6 update looks good. If you do want to keep the Amount open questions in, could you at least file issue(s) for them in the proposal-amount repo? I can't find anything about the topic there at least yet.

Also, as one more argument for including them, we already support time units for `-per-` units:
```
new Intl.NumberFormat('en', { style: 'unit', unit: 'minute-per-week' }).format(7*24*60)
// "10,080 min/w"
```
content.formatted_body:

Also, as one more argument for including them, we already support time units for -per- units:
